SEARCH
Package com.berryrock.integrationhub.model

Class BuildiumAddressRecord

java.lang.Object
com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.BuildiumAddressRecord
public class BuildiumAddressRecord extends Object
Represents a single address record fetched from Buildium. Part of the address pipeline — produced by BuildiumClientImpl.fetchActiveLeaseAddresses() by joining the /v1/rentals/units and /v1/leases endpoints. Each record corresponds to one rental unit that has a street address and, where available, an active lease linked to that unit. The pipeline uses the normalized form of the raw address to look up matching rows in the Loan Tape (Google Sheets) so that Buildium property and lease IDs can be written back.

    Constructs an empty record.

    • getBuildiumPropertyId

      public String getBuildiumPropertyId()
      Returns the Buildium property ID for the parent property.
      Returns:
      Buildium property ID, or null if not set

    • setBuildiumPropertyId

      public void setBuildiumPropertyId(String buildiumPropertyId)
      Sets the Buildium property ID.
      Parameters:
      buildiumPropertyId - Buildium property ID

    • getBuildiumUnitId

      public String getBuildiumUnitId()
      Returns the Buildium unit ID.
      Returns:
      Buildium unit ID, or null if not set

    • setBuildiumUnitId

      public void setBuildiumUnitId(String buildiumUnitId)
      Sets the Buildium unit ID.
      Parameters:
      buildiumUnitId - Buildium unit ID

    • getRawAddress

      public String getRawAddress()
      Returns the raw street address as received from Buildium.
      Returns:
      raw address string, or null if not set

    • setRawAddress

      public void setRawAddress(String rawAddress)
      Sets the raw address string.
      Parameters:
      rawAddress - street address as returned by the Buildium API

    • getCity

      public String getCity()
      Returns the city component of the unit's address.
      Returns:
      city name, or null if not set

    • setCity

      public void setCity(String city)
      Sets the city component.
      Parameters:
      city - city name

    • getState

      public String getState()
      Returns the state component of the unit's address.
      Returns:
      two-letter state code, or null if not set

    • setState

      public void setState(String state)
      Sets the state component.
      Parameters:
      state - two-letter state code

    • getPostalCode

      public String getPostalCode()
      Returns the postal code component of the unit's address.
      Returns:
      ZIP or postal code, or null if not set

    • setPostalCode

      public void setPostalCode(String postalCode)
      Sets the postal code component.
      Parameters:
      postalCode - ZIP or postal code

    • getNormalizedAddress

      public String getNormalizedAddress()
      Returns the normalized composite key used for address matching.
      Returns:
      normalized key in the form ADDRESS|CITY|STATE|ZIP, or null if not yet populated

    • setNormalizedAddress

      public void setNormalizedAddress(String normalizedAddress)
      Sets the normalized composite key.
      Parameters:
      normalizedAddress - normalized key produced by the pipeline

    • getBuildiumLeaseId

      public String getBuildiumLeaseId()
      Returns the Buildium lease ID of the active lease linked to this unit.
      Returns:
      lease ID, or null if no active lease is associated

    • setBuildiumLeaseId

      public void setBuildiumLeaseId(String buildiumLeaseId)
      Sets the Buildium lease ID.
      Parameters:
      buildiumLeaseId - lease ID from the Buildium active-leases endpoint
